content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Hybrid85: Operations Manager Anywhere in the World 🇺🇸 United States of America Nebraska Management and Finance Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Lincoln, NE <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://hybrid85.com">https://hybrid85.com</a> </p> <p>About us</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>We're a small, all-remote team behind three direct-to-farmer seed brands — Hybrid85 (non-GMO corn), Cover Crop Exchange (cover crop seed), and Override Ag (glyphosate-tolerant corn). We sell straight to farmers, skipping the legacy dealer network. We're profitable and growing, we invest in automation, and we hire people who take genuine ownership of their work.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>We're hiring our first Operations Manager to own post-sale (and some pre-sale) operations end-to-end — email-first, customer-facing work — so the team can stay focused on growth, sales, and product. You're the person customers hear from, and the one who makes sure orders actually get where they're going.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>What you'd own</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>In peak seasons (Feb–April and Aug–Nov), you own front-line customer support and the inbox ("Where's my seed?", order changes, problem resolution); shipping coordination (ship dates, tracking, freight status, lost-shipment follow-up); fulfillment problem-solving with our warehouses when an order is short, mislabeled, or needs redoing; and chasing down the supplier and warehouse paperwork that keeps our records accurate. In the calmer off-season, you track the team's projects and to-dos so they don't slip, handle recurring admin and compliance paperwork, coordinate occasional mailings, and help prepare for upcoming seasons.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Who we're looking for</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Traits that matter far more than industry experience:</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>You communicate clearly and warmly in writing — you're the voice customers hear most, and you write calmly even when the inbox is stacked.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>You operate independently — you make defensible calls when the picture is ~70% complete and loop owners in for genuine judgment calls, not every decision.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>You own loose ends — when something lands in your lap with no clear owner, you take it, and you follow up on commitments without being reminded.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>You're comfortable with new software — our stack changes and you'll live in our admin tools all day.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>You reach for AI and new tools — we use AI heavily and we're leaning in harder as we grow. You should already use these tools by choice and be genuinely excited to push them further.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>We'll teach you everything industry-specific. This is an email-first role — we care most about how you write and how you keep things from slipping.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>What to expect</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>High autonomy — we're hiring you to own this, not to ask permission. You'll own our operations, not a team (no direct reports). Seasonal intensity — peak stretches are high-tempo; the rest of the year is calmer. We automate aggressively, and your job is to do the work and be our partner in deciding what to automate next. We're remote — you'd report directly to a founder; the Lincoln, NE office is optional, otherwise work from wherever.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Compensation &amp; benefits</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Base salary $70,000–$100,000 (depending on experience; we'll go higher for the right person), plus a performance bonus tied to peak-season outcomes, a $1,000/month healthcare stipend, and unlimited vacation.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Location &amp; requirements</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Remote, US only — any time zone. Must have authorization to work in the US; we do not sponsor visas at this time. Roughly 40 hours/week.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>How to apply</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Apply here: <a href="https://tally.so/r/aQlo12">https://tally.so/r/aQlo12</a></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>We read every application and respond to everyone, even if it's a "no." Hybrid85, Cover Crop Exchange, and Override Ag are equal opportunity employers.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hybrid85-operations-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hybrid85-operations-manager</a></p> Fri, 26 Jun 2026 20:10:34 +0000 Sun, 26 Jul 2026 20:10:34 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hybrid85-operations-manager https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/hybrid85-operations-manager Simplero: Executive Assistant Anywhere in the World California Admin, Executive Assistant, and Executive Virtual Assistance All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0081/5989/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Los Angeles, CA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://www.simplero.com">http://www.simplero.com</a> </p> <div class="builder-node js-builder-node builder-wysiwyg builder-paragraph builder-node-element node-n_Cc32VNoe1JNvZn7X builder-previewable w-full apply-node-styles node-n_Cc32VNoe1JNvZn7X-apply-node-styles apply-node-styles-padding apply-node-styles-border apply-node-styles-border-radius apply-node-styles-box-shadow"> <div class="node-content js-node-content flex-1 min-w-0 relative"> <div class="breakpoint-container"> <div class="wysiwyg-content"> <p>Full-time. Remote. Pacific Time strongly preferred. Los Angeles county would be a huge bonus so we can be in person when it makes sense.</p> <p><strong>I'm looking for someone who genuinely loves being an Executive Assistant.</strong></p> <p>Someone who gets real satisfaction from bringing order to chaos, building systems that make life easier, and being the person behind the scenes who makes everything run smoothly.</p> <p>When I'm able to stay in my zone of genius because you've already thought three steps ahead, that's a great day for both of us.</p> <p>If your favorite feeling is making other people more effective, keep reading.</p> <h3><strong>The role</strong></h3> <p>You love to move fast. You can handle a lot of ideas being thrown at you and know not to run with every last thing that gets thrown out there. You think. Ask questions. Use judgment.</p> <p>I need someone who enjoys bringing structure to that without slowing it down.</p> <p>Someone who's willing to challenge me when it matters.</p> <p>You'll ask great questions. You'll notice when I'm getting pulled in too many directions. You'll remind me what I said was important. You'll tell me when something doesn't feel aligned or when you think I'm missing something.</p> <p>I'm not looking for someone who just takes orders. I'm looking for a thought partner who helps me stay focused on what matters most.</p> <h3><strong>What you'll actually do</strong></h3> <p>This isn't just a
